name: The Gloom Hollows
description: A dimension of vast underground caverns lit by pulsing magenta crystals and carpeted in luminous fungi. Stalactites drip with phosphorescent slime, and the air shimmers with spore haze. Creatures here are cave-adapted — blind salamanders that hunt by vibration, crystal-shelled beetles, predatory fungi, and massive hippo-like beasts that guard the deepest grottos. The ground is uneven stone studded with geode clusters that shatter into disorienting prismatic bursts.
mood: Oppressive darkness punctuated by sudden neon flashes. The crystals are beautiful but the things that live among them will scramble your senses and tear you apart while you're reeling.
mechanicalIdentity: Status effects — confused and vulnerable from disorienting crystal bursts and psychic spores, with some knockback from shattering geodes. Less poison than dimension 1, more about making enemies hit harder and the player act erratically.

enemyBatches.name: fodder
enemyBatches.description: Small, cheap enemies that swarm in numbers. Each is fragile but contributes to a cumulative threat.

enemies.name: Cave Mite
enemies.description: A small skittering beetle with a crystalline carapace that flashes magenta when agitated.

enemies.name: Spore Puffer
enemies.description: A floating fungal polyp that drifts and releases bursts of disorienting spores.

enemies.name: Grub Crawler
enemies.description: A pale eyeless larva with mandibles coated in crystal-dissolving acid.

enemies.name: Crystal Scarab
enemies.role: standard melee, signature on-death KNOCKBACK burst
enemies.description: A beetle with a geode-cluster shell that detonates into shards when killed.

enemyBatches.name: standard
enemyBatches.description: Backbone of mid-tier encounters. Each has 2 distinct abilities and a clear role.

enemies.name: Grotto Salamander
enemies.description: A large eyeless amphibian with translucent skin revealing pulsing magenta veins.

enemies.name: Prism Moth
enemies.description: A large moth with crystal-dust wings that scatter blinding prismatic patterns.

enemies.name: Fungal Shambler
enemies.role: melee tank, applies confused + knockback spore burst
enemies.description: A humanoid mass of bioluminescent fungi with a heavy mushroom-cap head.

enemies.name: Geode Crab
enemies.role: elite melee, glass-cannon burst + on-death shard explosion
enemies.description: A crustacean with a geode shell — crystalline interior exposed through cracks that glow hot magenta.

enemyBatches.name: elite
enemyBatches.description: Tougher, signature encounters with distinct mechanics. Each feels like a meaningful threat.

enemies.name: Hollow Hippo
enemies.role: elite tank, massive knockback charge + vulnerable stomp
enemies.description: A massive cave-hippo with crystalline growths erupting from its back. Pale hide, glowing magenta eyes.

enemies.name: Crystal Weaver
enemies.role: kite elite, AoE confused + vulnerable field
enemies.description: A large cave spider with crystal-tipped legs that plants resonating crystal traps.

enemies.name: Mycelium Horror
enemies.description: A towering fungal entity with a network of bioluminescent tendrils that whip and flash.

enemies.name: Shard Serpent
enemies.role: fast assassin elite, applies vulnerable + bleeding
enemies.description: A crystalline snake with razor-edged scales that shed cutting fragments as it moves.

enemyBatches.name: boss
enemyBatches.description: Centerpiece fights — each boss has a signature multi-ability identity and onDeath effects.

enemies.name: The Gemwarden
enemies.role: ranged boss caster, signature PRISM STORM AoE confused + vulnerable
enemies.description: An ancient salamander shaman fused with a massive crystal formation on its back, wielding refracted light as a weapon.

enemies.name: Grotto Titan
enemies.role: tank boss, hardest single-hit damage in dimension
enemies.description: An enormous cave hippo armored in fused geode plates, with a crystalline horn that splits into prismatic fractures.

enemies.name: The Mycelium
enemies.role: stationary horror boss, AoE confused + knockback + vulnerable
enemies.description: A massive fungal network that has overtaken an entire cavern, with a pulsing magenta core surrounded by writhing tendrils.

enemies.name: Crystalback Rex
enemies.role: fast melee boss apex predator, Crystal Charge + vulnerable + bleeding
enemies.description: A colossal reptilian predator covered in razor-sharp crystal growths, the apex hunter of the deep caverns.

items.name: Crystal Shard Blade
items.description: A long shard of magenta crystal with a leather-wrapped base. Crude but wickedly sharp, edges glinting with internal light.

items.name: Stalactite Spear
items.description: A broken stalactite sharpened to a point and bound to a fungal-wood shaft. Drips with phosphorescent slime.

items.name: Fungal Mace
items.description: A dense mushroom-cap hardened to stone, mounted on a stout handle. Releases disorienting spores on impact.

items.name: Cavern Bow
items.description: A bow of petrified cave-wood strung with spider silk. Fires arrows tipped with crystal shards.

items.name: Prism Staff
items.description: A staff of dark stone crowned with a multifaceted crystal that refracts light into blinding prismatic beams.

items.name: Geode Knuckles
items.description: A pair of cracked geode halves strapped over the fists. The crystalline interior edges cut deep.

items.name: Mycelium Whip
items.description: A long bioluminescent tendril harvested from a fungal horror, still twitching. Reaches far and stings with disorienting toxins.

items.name: Titan Jawbone
items.description: The massive jawbone of a Grotto Titan, studded with crystal teeth. Swinging it shatters the air.

items.name: Crystal Buckler
items.description: A round shield carved from a single geode slab. The crystalline face refracts light, disorienting attackers.

items.name: Fungal Bulwark
items.description: A large shield grown from layered fungal plates, reinforced with crystal veins. Tough and slightly luminous.

items.name: Prism Pendant
items.description: A small faceted crystal on a cord of braided spider silk. Pulses with soft magenta light.

items.name: Spore Sachet
items.description: A sealed pouch of dried cave fungus that releases a steady trickle of protective spores.

items.name: Salamander Eye
items.description: A preserved eye from a grotto elder, set in crystal. It still sees in total darkness.

items.name: Cave Moss Poultice
items.description: A wad of bioluminescent cave moss packed with mineral-rich mud. Glows faintly green when applied.

items.name: Flashbang Geode
items.description: A volatile geode packed with pressurized crystal gas. Shatters in a blinding prismatic explosion.

items.name: Spore Bomb
items.description: A dense fungal pod filled with concentrated disorienting spores. When crushed, clouds the area in hallucinogenic haze.
